profile.body1: When dedication and attention to detail extend beyond one's own portfolio to continually deliver massive added value for our esteemed clients, an advisory and investment environment is created that you will be proud to share with your loved ones.
profile.body2: This mindset and the maxim of always deploying all resources with absolute effectiveness and conscientiousness guarantee you unparalleled performance and the special measure of humanity at all times.

items.client_quote: The team convinced me with their structured approach and exceptional market knowledge. A collaboration I would recommend at any time.
Clasen not only found us the perfect property but guided us through the entire process — discreetly, competently, and with genuine passion.
As an entrepreneur, discretion and efficiency were paramount to me. Clasen delivered both in the highest measure — and achieved a return that far exceeded my expectations.

credo.quote:
"The best time to plant
a tree was 20 years ago.

The second best time
is now…"

clasenHero.heading:
One Conviction.
No Detour.
clasenHero.body: From the 18-year-old whose first financing request was rejected by the bank, to the Family Office entrusted with entrepreneurs' wealth. What lies between is not a career — it is a credo.

clasenWarum.body: Making the asset class that carried me through every personal crisis and every financial misstep accessible to all who deserve it. Not just for institutional investors. Not just for heirs. For everyone willing to put their capital to work.

entries.subtitle: Munich. The beginning of everything.
entries.body: Alexander Christian Clasen is born in Munich in the summer of 1993 — the city that would later become the center of his work and passion. At the time, no one could have guessed that this city's real estate market would become his playing field. Probably not even himself.

entries.subtitle: The rejection that set everything in motion.
entries.body: On the day of his 18th birthday, Alexander submits his first real estate financing request. The bank's answer: rejection. No equity, no income, no chance. For most, that would have been the end of the thought. For him, it was the beginning of an obsession.

entries.subtitle: «Rich Dad Poor Dad» and the revelation.
entries.body: After graduating, a book and a glimpse into the world of well-off friends opens an entirely new perspective: passive income through real estate. Alexander dives deep into specialist literature. Law and psychology studies begin — but increasingly take a back seat. The real education takes place in books, balance sheets, and land register extracts.

entries.subtitle: The dropout, against everyone's advice.
entries.body: Shortly before completing his degree, Alexander drops out of his costly psychology studies. Not out of indifference — but out of clarity. He recognizes the potential that a real estate portfolio of his own could have on his sought-after early retirement. Everyone advises against it. He does it anyway. This decision — to consistently swim against the current — becomes the leitmotif of his entire career.

entries.subtitle: 100 years of history. Overtaken in one year.
entries.body: As a career changer, Alexander joins one of Munich's most renowned estate agencies — over a century of company history, established structures, long-standing records. One year later, several are broken: most expensive apartment brokered, largest rental mandate — records that had stood for decades. The realization: the Munich real estate market is stagnant. And ready for a revolution.

milestone.label: Year · Multiple sales records broken from over 100 years of company history

entries.subtitle: The other side. Swiss precision.
entries.body: Before the planned step into self-employment comes a deliberate detour: a modern Swiss franchise system. Contrary to everything he had known before. Different processes, different mindset, different standards. Alexander absorbs both — and afterwards knows even more precisely how his own company will look. And how it won't.

entries.subtitle: The first company of his own. With a clear mission.
entries.body: Foundation of the first independent brokerage — with an unusual strategy: the focus lies exclusively on sellers who had already written off estate agents. People convinced they didn't need a broker. Often enough, they were wrong. Over 500 properties are subsequently brokered. The result in the first year: seven-figure revenue — and confirmation that a different path is possible.

milestone.label: Properties Brokered · 7-figure revenue in the founding year

entries.subtitle: The construction company. Because true independence knows no compromises.
entries.body: In the same founding year comes the next consequential step: the establishment of an in-house construction company. The reason is as simple as it is strategic — whoever promises clients "everything from a single source" cannot be dependent on third-party companies along the way. Quality, timing, and cost control remain entirely in-house. For clients: one contact, one responsibility, one outcome — from the first consultation to the completed property.

entries.subtitle: An ensemble. Fully in-house.
entries.body: A longstanding client entrusts CLASEN with the acquisition of a complete apartment building ensemble in a solid Munich location. What follows is a full-scope mandate: property acquisition, financial planning, subsidy management, core renovation, project development, interior construction, letting, and ongoing property management — all from a single source. Proof of what true partnership means.

entries.subtitle: Munich, Theresienwiese. Four years. A monument.
entries.body: A Munich hereditary community entrusts CLASEN with one of the most demanding mandates in the company's history: the extensive, four-year core renovation of a well-known heritage building near the Theresienwiese. Historic preservation, inheritance law, renovation complexity, Munich's bureaucratic landscape. The project stands for what defines CLASEN: discretion, perseverance, and the ability to deliver results where others fail.

milestone.label: Years project duration · Heritage Building · Theresienwiese Munich

entries.subtitle: CLASEN Family Office. The next key.
entries.body: The brokerage becomes a Family Office. The step is consistent — not a reinvention, but a completion. €329.7 million in entrusted client assets. 687 brokered investments. 97% referral rate. The foundation is solid. What follows is the next level: tailored capital investments, tax-saving models, and off-market access for all who want to put their capital to work — at terms usually only known to institutional investors.

milestone.label: M € in entrusted client assets · 97% referral rate

entries.subtitle: Tax optimization as the supreme discipline.
entries.body: With a growing client base comes a growing realization: the biggest lever in wealth building is not the return — it is the tax burden. CLASEN specializes consistently in tailored tax-saving models for top earners, entrepreneurs, and sophisticated investors. In close collaboration with leading law firms, legally sound concepts are developed that structurally and sustainably reduce clients' entire tax burden — not as a trick, but as architecture. Once you understand how much capital is lost here annually, you will never think about investments the same way again.
